---
title: "Henry G. Lyford M.D."
---

## Henry G. Lyford M.D.

**Dates:** (b.1792/3)

### Description

doctor attending the dying WCY (24 Feb 1854)

### Biography

Henry G. Lyford (b. 1792/3), M.D. St. Andrews and General Practitioner, lived at 157 Southgate Street, Winchester in the 1851 census.

### Letters

- Letter from February 25, 1854.
- Letter from February 24, 1854.
- Letter from Febry 23d [1854]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
